title: Best From the Rest
desc: India is a country with rich heritage, culture and history. Five best museums in India are showcased to the audience in order to shed light on the country's glory.

title: Landmarks
desc: The Killing Fields are a reminder of one of the most shameful periods in history of Cambodia, where horrific killings under the regime of the despot Pol Pot took place.

title: Route 66
desc: A young American traveller gears up for an epic road trip along Route 66 that spans across various states, time zones and heritage sites.

desc: Chef Palani Murugan demonstrates his culinary expertise while preparing a variety of mouth-watering dishes using traditional ingredients.

desc: Alexandra unravels the secrets of the ancient Uzbek city of Bukhara as she explores the ancient fortress, local bazaars and a traditional carpet factory.

title: Off the Grid
desc: Alex continues his journey on the Wild Atlantic Way and is in Kinsale. Starting with a heritage walk and ending with exploring the Kinnegar Brewery.

title: Backpack
desc: Heather visits Pozarevac before exploring the ancient town of Viminacium and the National Museum. Finally, she concludes her day with a trip to Rajko's Cave in Majdanpek.
